title: Faculty respond to +AI initiatives
summary_en: After the launch of the provost office’s +AI academic initiative to integrate AI into the classroom, divisions continue to ensue concerning AI and opinions on the University’s largely positive position on the technology.
author: Lexi Lawsky

title: SU FY27 budget increases overall student group funding, cuts major programming
summary_en: In February this year, Student Union (SU) approved its fiscal year 2027 (FY27) general budget of approximately $4.8 million, an increase from about $4.65 million allocated for FY26. For the upcoming fiscal year, more funding will be directed towards student groups compared to FY26.
author: Pranathi Murthy
title_cn: 华盛顿大学学生会2027财年预算提升学生团体总资助额度 削减部分重点项目及特定类别团体资助

title: Amanda Nguyen – “an astronaut, a scientist, and an activist” – speaks at WashU
summary_en: For someone who’s been to space, Amanda Nguyen is incredibly down to earth. Nguyen, a sexual assault advocate and the first Vietnamese woman to go to space, spoke about her journey during a fireside chat on Thursday, April 16.
author: Flannery Poon
title_cn: 《宇航员、科学家、社会活动家阮安美在华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）发表演讲》

title: Changes to McKelvey PhD admissions bring an end to lab rotations
summary_en: All of McKelvey’s PhD programs have transitioned away from rotational admissions this year, moving to a fully direct-admit model where incoming PhD students are matched with a single faculty advisor before setting foot on campus. The shift mirrors a broader national trend driven largely by one factor: funding.
author: Ella Giere
title_cn: 华盛顿大学麦凯尔维工程学院调整博士招生政策 取消实验室轮转制度
